Versatile Banner Stand Display for Professional Indoor Events

The Versatile Banner Stand provides excellent stability, easy adjustment and is capable of holding two different banners to create a double sided display. It breaks down into a compact, flat box for easy shipping and transportation. The horizontal support bars accommodate dowels for pole pocketed banners and can hold rigid substrates up to 6 mm thick. Dowels are included.

Perfect for trade shows, retail environments, and professional presentations, this banner stand system combines portability with professional presentation capabilities. The printed banners will have a 2" pole pocket on the top and bottom. Please keep all important text and graphics at least 3" from the top and bottom for optimal display.

With this product, you will receive the versatile banner stand hardware and your custom 72" x 24" banner, creating a complete professional display solution for your indoor marketing needs.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Versatile Banner Stand Material Options for Indoor Display

Material Choices for Professional Banner Stands

13 oz Vinyl: Our most standard banner material, rated for both indoor and outdoor use. Provides excellent durability and vibrant color reproduction for professional presentations.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please discuss your specific application with your Customer Service Representative.

Banner Soft: Matte finish with vibrant colors, ideal for indoor displays where glare reduction is important.

Request a free sample packet of materials to evaluate which option works best for your banner stand display.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Finishing Options for Professional Display

All banners for the Versatile Banner Stand include professional pole pocket finishing to ensure proper installation and display performance:

  • Top & Bottom Pole Pockets: 2" pole pockets sewn on top and bottom for secure mounting
  • Professional Hemming: Reinforced edges prevent fraying and extend banner life
  • Hardware Included: Complete dowel system included with banner stand
  • Double-Sided Capability: Stand accommodates two banners for front and back display

The banner stand hardware breaks down into a compact, flat box for easy transportation and storage between events.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Production Times for Custom Banner Stand Orders

We provide flexible production time ranges for your banner stand projects. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from two to five business days.

Express Production Options

2 Business Days Express: Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for urgent trade show needs!

Standard Production Timing

3 Business Days Standard: This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom banner stand order.

Budget-Friendly Production Schedule

5 Business Days Saver: If you're not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

Important Notes:

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases - contact customer service
  • Production time includes the banner printing and stand preparation
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Banner Stand Payment & Ordering Options

All banner stands must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept multiple payment methods to make your ordering process convenient:

  • Credit Cards: Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover
  • Check Orders: Personal or business checks accepted (must be received before production begins)

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your banner stand order and artwork.

For check orders, see detailed information about our check processing.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Banner Stand Hardware

General Shipping Information

If you have any questions about shipping your banner stand, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped standard.

You will receive a tracking number once your banner stand package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders due to the banner stand hardware dimensions.

Available Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods for banner stand orders:

  • Economy: 5–10 Business Days
  • Standard: 3–5 Business Days
  • Three Day: 3 Business Days
  • Two Day: 2 Business Days
  • Overnight: 1 Business Day

Important Shipping Notes:

  • After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply
  • Damaged goods must be returned before replacement banner stands will be sent
  • Lost packages will be replaced after shipping company confirms loss (7-10 business days)
  • International customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation
PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Applications for Versatile Banner Stand Displays

The Versatile Banner Stand is perfect for a wide variety of indoor professional applications:

Trade Show & Event Applications

  • Trade Show Booths: Create professional booth displays with double-sided capability
  • Conference Presentations: Portable displays for speaking engagements and seminars
  • Job Fairs: Eye-catching recruitment displays that set up quickly
  • Product Launches: Professional presentation stands for new product introductions

Business & Retail Uses

  • Retail Environments: In-store promotional displays and product announcements
  • Lobby Displays: Welcome messages and company information in office environments
  • Restaurant Specials: Menu boards and daily special announcements
  • Real Estate: Property information displays for open houses and sales offices

The compact, flat-pack design makes this banner stand ideal for businesses that need portable display solutions for multiple locations or events.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Professional Artwork Specifications for Banner Stand Printing

Artwork Guidelines for Banner Stand Graphics

Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps or .ai (Adobe Illustrator) — with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Important Design Considerations:

  • Keep all important text and graphics at least 3" from the top and bottom
  • 2" pole pockets will be added to top and bottom of your banner
  • Design for 72" x 24" finished size
  • 300 dpi or higher resolution files work best

Order Proof Options for Banner Stand Projects

If you would like to double-check your banner stand order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Match Proof System for Critical Banner Stand Applications

If your banner stand project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Your Custom Banner Stand Display Today

Ready to create a professional display solution for your next event or business presentation? The Versatile Banner Stand offers the perfect combination of portability, durability, and professional appearance.

What You'll Receive:

  • Complete banner stand hardware system
  • Custom printed 72" x 24" banner with pole pockets
  • Mounting dowels and all necessary hardware
  • Compact carrying case for easy transportation

Why Choose Our Banner Stand System:

  • Professional Quality: Durable construction for repeated use
  • Double-Sided Capability: Display two different banners simultaneously
  • Easy Setup: Quick assembly for trade shows and events
  • Portable Design: Breaks down flat for easy transportation

Configure your custom banner stand above and place your order today. Need help with your design or have questions? Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 for professional assistance.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions

What comes with the Versatile Banner Stand order?

You'll receive the complete banner stand hardware system, your custom printed 72" x 24" banner with pole pockets, mounting dowels, and all necessary hardware for setup.

Can I use this banner stand outdoors?

The Versatile Banner Stand is designed primarily for indoor use. While our vinyl material is suitable for outdoor applications, the stand hardware performs best in indoor environments like trade shows, retail spaces, and office lobbies.

How does the double-sided display feature work?

The banner stand is capable of holding two different banners simultaneously, creating a front and back display. You can order additional banners separately to take advantage of this feature.

What are the setup requirements for the banner stand?

The banner stand is designed for easy setup with no tools required. It breaks down into a compact, flat box for transportation and assembles quickly at your event or display location.

What should I know about the pole pocket finishing?

All banners include 2" pole pockets on the top and bottom. Please keep important text and graphics at least 3" from the top and bottom edges to ensure they remain visible when the banner is mounted.

Can I get rush production on my banner stand order?

Yes, we offer 2-day express production for urgent needs. Emergency and same-day rushes may be available in some cases - please contact our customer service team for availability.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
